items.title: 国际音标 · 元音 (Vowels)
items.instruction: 根据例词写出划线部分的元音音标，或按提示填空。

blocks.text: 国际音标 (IPA) 是记录英语读音的符号，共 48 个：元音 20 个、辅音 28 个。掌握音标能帮助你独立拼读单词、纠正发音，是学好英语的基础。音标写在两条斜线之间，如 /iː/。
发音时口形和舌位保持不变的元音叫单元音。可分为长元音（带 ː）和短元音。
/ə/ 是最常见的元音，多出现在非重读音节，读得又轻又短，叫“弱读”。
由一个元音滑向另一个元音、口形有变化的元音叫双元音。前重后轻，前长后短。

exercises.q: 字母 e 在 see, tree 中发长音 ______。
字母 i 在 sit, big 中发短音 ______。
字母组合 oo 在 book, good 中常发 ______。
字母 a 在 cat, bag 中发 ______。
字母 u 在 cup, bus 中发 ______。
字母组合 ay 在 day, play 中发双元音 ______。
字母 i 在 bike, five 中发双元音 ______。
字母组合 ow 在 how, now 中发 ______。
字母 o 在 no, go, home 中发 ______。
非重读音节中最常见的弱读元音是 ______。

items.title: 国际音标 · 辅音 (Consonants)
items.instruction: 根据例词写出划线部分的辅音音标，或按提示填空。

blocks.text: 辅音发音时气流在口腔中受到阻碍。28 个辅音中，很多成对出现：一个清辅音（声带不振动）、一个浊辅音（声带振动）。
/θ/ 和 /ð/ 要把舌尖轻放在上下齿之间，是中国学生的难点。
/ŋ/ 只出现在音节末尾（如 -ing 结尾），发音时舌后部抬起，气流从鼻腔出来。

exercises.q: 字母 p 在 pen, cup 中发清辅音 ______。
字母 b 在 bag, job 中发浊辅音 ______。
字母组合 th 在 think 中发清辅音 ______。
字母组合 th 在 this, mother 中发浊辅音 ______。
字母组合 sh 在 she, fish 中发 ______。
字母组合 ch 在 chair, watch 中发 ______。
字母组合 ng 在 sing, English 中发 ______。
字母 j 在 job, orange 中发 ______。
字母 z 在 zoo 中发浊辅音 ______。
字母 y 在 yes, you 中发半元音 ______。

items.title: 读音规则与拼读 (Pronunciation Rules)
items.instruction: 根据读音规则填空。

sections.heading: 一、元音字母在重读音节中的读音

blocks.text: 元音字母 a, e, i, o, u 在开音节和闭音节中读音不同。掌握规律有助于见词能读。
开音节：元音字母后没有辅音，或只有一个辅音字母 + 不发音的 e（如 name, bike）。闭音节：元音字母后有辅音字母且不以 e 结尾（如 cat, bed）。
英语单词有重读音节，读得重而长。音标中重音符号 ˈ 标在重读音节前。
ˈteacher（重音在前）  toˈday（重音在后）  baˈnana（重音在中）
双音节词多数重音在第一个音节：ˈapple, ˈwater, ˈhappy。
以 -tion, -sion 结尾的词，重音在其前一个音节：inforˈmation, deˈcision。

sections.heading: 四、字母 c 和 g 的软硬音

blocks.text: c 在 e, i, y 前读 /s/（软音）：city, nice, cycle；其他情况读 /k/：cat, cup。
g 在 e, i, y 前常读 /dʒ/（软音）：age, giant；其他情况读 /g/：go, big。

exercises.q: name 中的 a 在开音节读 ______。
cat 中的 a 在闭音节读 ______。
bike 中的 i 在开音节读 ______。
字母组合 ee 在 see 中读 ______。
字母组合 ar 在 car, farm 中读 ______。
字母组合 oy 在 boy 中读 ______。
单词 today 的重音在 ______ 个音节。
字母 c 在 city 中读 ______。
exercises.tip: c 在 i 前读软音

exercises.q: 字母 g 在 age 中读 ______。
exercises.tip: g 在 e 前读软音

exercises.q: 字母组合 oo 在 book 中读 ______。

items.title: 名词 (Nouns)
items.instruction: 写出下列名词的正确形式（复数或所有格）填空。

blocks.text: 名词是表示人、事物、地点或抽象概念名称的词。名词可分为专有名词和普通名词两大类。

rows: 特定的人、地、机构等，首字母大写

blocks.text: 可数名词与不可数名词的区分是初中重点：不可数名词一般没有复数，也不能直接用 a/an 修饰。

sections.heading: 二、可数名词的复数变化规则

rows: 以 辅音字母+y 结尾
变 y 为 i 加 -es
以 元音字母+y 结尾
多变 f/fe 为 v 加 -es
以 辅音字母+o 结尾

blocks.text: 不规则复数（需单独记忆）
man→men, woman→women, child→children, foot→feet, tooth→teeth, mouse→mice
单复数同形：sheep, deer, fish, Chinese, Japanese

sections.heading: 三、不可数名词的量的表达

blocks.text: 不可数名词表达数量时，借助 “a/some + 量词 + of + 名词” 结构。
a glass of water（一杯水）  two cups of tea（两杯茶）
a piece of paper/news/advice（一张纸／一条新闻／一条建议）
a bottle of milk  a bag of rice  three pieces of bread
复数时把量词变复数：two glasses of water，而 water 本身不变。
1. 's 所有格（多表示有生命的事物）
Tom's book（汤姆的书）  the students' books（学生们的书）
以 s 结尾的复数只加 ’：the teachers' room；不以 s 结尾的复数加 's：children's
2. of 所有格（多表示无生命的事物）
the door of the room（房间的门）  the end of the story（故事的结尾）
3. 双重所有格 / 特殊用法
a friend of my father's（我父亲的一位朋友）；表示时间、距离等：today's newspaper, ten minutes' walk

exercises.q: There are three ______ (box) on the desk.
I have two ______ (knife).
exercises.tip: f 结尾变 v 加 -es

exercises.q: Look at those ______ (child).
We need a ______ of ______ (piece / paper).
exercises.tip: 不可数名词用 a piece of

exercises.q: This is ______ (Tom) bike.
The ______ (woman) are talking over there.
How many ______ (tomato) do you want?
There is some ______ (water) in the bottle.
These ______ (photo) are beautiful.
It's about ten ______ (minute) walk from here.

items.title: 冠词 (Articles)
items.instruction: 用 a / an / the 或用 “/” 表示不填，完成下列填空。

blocks.text: 冠词是虚词，放在名词前帮助说明名词所指的人或事物。分为不定冠词 a/an、定冠词 the，以及不使用冠词的“零冠词”。
a/an 表示“一个”，用于单数可数名词前，指不确定的某一个。区分依据是后接单词的读音（不是字母）。

rows: 后接辅音音素开头的词
后接元音音素开头的词
a book, a boy, a university [ju:]
an apple, an hour [au], an egg

blocks.text: 主要用法
第一次提到某人/物：I have a dog.
表示“每一”：three times a week（每周三次）
表示某一类：A tiger is a dangerous animal.
特指双方都知道的人或物：Close the door, please.
第二次提到前面出现过的名词：I have a cat. The cat is white.
世界上独一无二的事物：the sun, the moon, the earth
用在序数词、形容词最高级前：the first, the best
用在乐器名词、方位、江河湖海、山脉群岛前：play the piano, in the east, the Great Wall
用在姓氏复数前表示一家人：the Greens（格林一家）
不可数名词、复数名词表示泛指：Water is important. I like apples.
专有名词、称呼、头衔前：China, Mr Green, Uncle Wang
三餐、球类、棋类运动前：have breakfast, play football, play chess
表示语言、学科、季节等：speak English, in spring
固定搭配：go to school/bed, by bus, at home, at noon

exercises.q: I have ______ apple. ______ apple is red.
exercises.tip: 首次用 an，再次特指用 the

exercises.q: She plays ______ piano very well.
We have ______ breakfast at seven.
There is ______ university near my home.
The sun rises in ______ east.
He is ______ honest boy.
exercises.tip: honest 的 h 不发音，元音开头

exercises.q: I go to ______ school by bus every day.
exercises.tip: go to school 固定搭配

exercises.q: Do you like playing ______ basketball?
Tom is ______ tallest in his class.
______ Greens are watching TV now.
exercises.tip: 姓氏复数前用 the 表一家人

items.title: 代词 (Pronouns)
items.instruction: 用适当的代词完成下列填空。

sections.heading: 一、人称代词与物主代词

blocks.text: 主格作主语，宾格作宾语；形容词性物主代词后必须接名词，名词性物主代词单独使用。
This is my book. = This book is mine.
反身代词：Help yourself. / I made it myself.（我自己做的）
this/these 指近处，that/those 指远处；this/that 修饰或指代单数，these/those 指代复数。
This is my pen. Those are her books.
some 多用于肯定句，any 多用于否定句和疑问句；但表示请求或希望对方回答 yes 时，疑问句也可用 some。
Would you like some tea?（表示请求，用 some）
复合不定代词被形容词修饰时，形容词后置
something important（重要的事情）  nothing new（没什么新鲜事）
many/much/few/little 的区分

exercises.q: This is ______ (I) book, not ______ (you).
exercises.tip: 形容词性物主 + 名词性物主

exercises.q: Can you help ______ (I) with my English?
The cat is washing ______ (it).
Is there ______ (some) wrong with your car?
I have ______ (few) money, so I can't buy it.
exercises.tip: 修饰不可数且否定意义

exercises.q: There are ______ (few) apples left; let's share them.
Would you like ______ (any) coffee?
Please help ______ (you) to some fish, kids.
These books are ______ (they).
There is ______ (something) interesting in the news.

items.title: 数词 (Numerals)
items.instruction: 写出括号内数词的正确形式填空。

blocks.text: 基数词表示数目多少（one, two...），序数词表示顺序先后（first, second...）。
序数词构成规律
一般在基数词后加 -th：four→fourth, six→sixth
特殊：one→first, two→second, three→third, five→fifth, eight→eighth, nine→ninth, twelve→twelfth
以 -ty 结尾变 y 为 i 加 -eth：twenty→twentieth
几十几只把个位变序数词：twenty-first, thirty-second
百位与十位间加 and：365 → three hundred and sixty-five
hundred/thousand/million 表确数时不加 s：two hundred students
表约数时加 s 并接 of：hundreds of / thousands of（成百上千的）
年份：1998 → nineteen ninety-eight；2008 → two thousand and eight
分数：分子基数词，分母序数词；分子大于1分母加 s
1/3 → one third   2/5 → two fifths   1/2 → a half   3/4 → three quarters
时间
6:15 → six fifteen / a quarter past six    7:45 → seven forty-five / a quarter to eight
日期
May 1st → May the first / the first of May

exercises.q: Today is my ______ (nine) birthday.
exercises.tip: nine 的序数词去 e 加 th

exercises.q: September is the ______ (nine) month of the year.
There are ______ (twelve) months in a year.
This is the ______ (twenty) time I have been here.
There are ______ (hundred) of people in the square.
Two ______ (third) of the students are girls.
His office is on the ______ (five) floor.
We have ______ (two hundred) books.
It's a ______ (quarter) past seven now.
Children's Day is on the ______ (one) of June.

items.title: 形容词 (Adjectives)
items.instruction: 用括号内形容词的适当形式或选择正确形式填空。

blocks.text: 形容词用来修饰名词或代词，说明其性质、状态或特征。
1. 作定语（放在名词前）
a beautiful girl（一个漂亮的女孩）  something delicious（好吃的东西，形容词后置）
2. 作表语（放在系动词后）
She is clever. / The soup tastes good.（系动词 look/feel/taste/sound/smell + 形容词）
3. 作宾语补足语
Keep the room clean.（保持房间干净）

sections.heading: 二、形容词的位置与顺序

blocks.text: 多个形容词修饰同一名词时，大致顺序为：限定词→大小→形状→年龄→颜色→国籍→材料→名词。
a big round wooden table  a nice little old red English car
复合不定代词（something/anything 等）后，形容词后置：nothing important。

sections.heading: 三、以 -ed 与 -ing 结尾的形容词

blocks.text: I am interested in the interesting book.

exercises.q: The film is very ______ (interest).
The children are ______ (excite) about the trip.
Please keep your hands ______ (clean).
Is there anything ______ (new) today?
exercises.tip: 复合不定代词后形容词后置

exercises.q: The soup smells ______ (good).
It was a ______ (tire) day; I felt very ______ (tire).
She looks ______ (happy) today.
exercises.tip: look 系动词后用形容词

exercises.q: They live in a ______ (big) new house.
I feel ______ (bore); this game is ______ (bore).
He is an ______ (honest) and kind man.

items.title: 副词 (Adverbs)
items.instruction: 用括号内词的适当形式填空。

sections.heading: 二、形容词变副词的规则

rows: 变 y 为 i 加 -ly

blocks.text: 有些词形容词副词同形：fast, hard, early, late, high, near；well 是 good 的副词。
He is a hard worker. He works hard.（hard 作形容词/副词同形）
hardly 意为“几乎不”，不是 hard 的副词：I can hardly hear you.
频度副词一般放在 be 动词/情态动词之后，实义动词之前：She is always late. / He often gets up early.
方式副词一般放在动词或宾语之后：He speaks English well.
enough 修饰形容词/副词时后置：old enough；修饰名词时前置：enough money。
too...to（太……而不能）：He is too young to go to school.

exercises.q: He runs very ______ (quick).
She sings ______ (beautiful).
They can ______ (easy) finish the work.
Tom studies ______ (hard) every day.
I can ______ (hard) believe it.
She speaks English very ______ (good).
He is ______ (careful) a driver and drives ______ (careful).
The boy is old ______ (enough) to dress himself.
He is ______ (too) tired to walk on.
She ______ (usual) goes to school on foot.

items.file: 形容词和副词的比较等级
items.title: 形容词和副词的比较等级 (Comparison)
items.instruction: 用括号内词的适当形式（比较级或最高级）填空。

blocks.text: 形容词和副词有原级、比较级和最高级三个等级。比较级表示两者比较，最高级表示三者及以上中最……。

rows: 变 y 为 i 加 -er/-est

blocks.text: 原级比较 as...as（和……一样）：He is as tall as me. 否定 not as/so...as。
比较级 + than：This box is heavier than that one.
比较级前可用 much / a little / even 修饰程度：much bigger, a little taller。
the + 最高级 + of/in 范围：He is the tallest in his class.
“越来越……”：比较级 and 比较级 / more and more + 多音节：hotter and hotter, more and more beautiful。
“越……越……”：The more, the better.（越多越好）
“三者中较……的一个”：one of the + 最高级 + 复数名词：one of the best students。

exercises.q: This book is ______ (interesting) than that one.
He is the ______ (tall) student in his class.
My bag is ______ (heavy) than yours.
Health is ______ (important) than money.
She sings ______ (well) than I.
It is one of the ______ (big) cities in China.
The weather is getting ______ (warm) and ______ (warm).
This is ______ (bad) film I have ever seen.
Tom runs ______ (fast) than Jack.
The more you read, the ______ (much) you know.

items.title: 介词 (Prepositions)
items.instruction: 用适当的介词填空。

rows: at 6 o'clock, at noon, at night
具体某天、星期、特定日期
on Monday, on May 1st, on a cold morning
in 2020, in May, in spring, in the morning

blocks.text: in the morning 但 on a cold morning（有具体修饰时用 on）。

rows: on the desk, on the wall
under the tree, over the bridge
between A and B, among the trees

sections.heading: 三、其他常用介词与固定搭配

blocks.text: 方式：by bus/bike, on foot, in English, with a pen
with（带有）/ without（没有）：a girl with long hair
about（关于）, like（像）, for（为了）, of（……的）
介词后接动词要用动名词形式：be good at swimming, look forward to seeing you。

exercises.q: I get up ______ six o'clock every morning.
We have a party ______ Christmas Day.
It often rains ______ summer.
The picture is ______ the wall.
There is a ball ______ the desk.
He has lived here ______ 2015.
She sits ______ Tom and Jack.
I go to school ______ bike.
He is good ______ playing football.
exercises.tip: be good at 固定搭配

exercises.q: We waited for the bus ______ half an hour.

items.title: 连词 (Conjunctions)
items.instruction: 用适当的连词填空。

blocks.text: 并列连词连接对等的词、短语或句子。

rows: Hurry up, or you'll be late.
It rained, so we stayed at home.
He stayed at home, for he was ill.

blocks.text: 汉语“虽然……但是……”“因为……所以……”在英语中 although/because 与 but/so 不能同时使用。
Both Tom and Jack are students. Either you or he is right.
时间：when, while, as, before, after, until, as soon as
原因：because, since, as
条件：if, unless
让步：although / though, even if
结果/目的：so...that, so that
I will call you as soon as I arrive. He is so tired that he can't walk.

exercises.q: Hurry up, ______ you will miss the train.
He was ill, ______ he didn't go to school.
______ Tom ______ Jack like sports. (两者都)
______ it was raining, we went out. (虽然)
I'll wait ______ you come back.
______ you don't hurry, you'll be late. (如果不)
Not only he ______ also I ______ interested in it.
He stayed at home ______ he was ill. (因为)
Call me ______ you get there. (一……就)
She is ______ tired ______ she can't move. (如此……以至于)

items.title: 一般现在时 (The Simple Present Tense)
items.instruction: 用括号内动词的适当形式填空。

blocks.text: 一般现在时表示经常性、习惯性的动作或状态，客观存在的事实、真理，以及主语当前的特征和能力。
1. 表示经常性、习惯性的动作
I get up at six every morning.（我每天早上六点起床。）
2. 表示客观真理、自然规律
The earth goes around the sun.（地球绕着太阳转。）
3. 表示主语现在的特征、状态或能力
My father is a doctor. / Tom likes basketball.
4. 表示按时间表将要发生的动作
The train leaves at 8:00 tomorrow.
5. 时间/条件状语从句中用一般现在时表将来（主将从现）
I will call you when he comes back.
1. be 动词 (am / is / are)
2. 实义动词（第三人称单数加 -s/-es，其余用原形）

sections.heading: 四、动词第三人称单数变化规则

rows: 变 y 为 i 加 -es

blocks.text: be 动词的句子
否定：He isn't at home.  疑问：Is he at home? —Yes, he is.
实义动词的句子（借助 do/does）
否定：She doesn't like coffee. / They don't like coffee.
疑问：Does she like coffee? —Yes, she does. / No, she doesn't.
特殊疑问：Where does he live?
always, usually, often, sometimes, seldom, never, every day/week, on Sundays, once a week 等。
频度副词一般放在 be 动词后、实义动词前：He often plays football.

exercises.q: My sister ______ (get) up at seven every day.
We ______ (not like) rainy days.
______ he ______ (do) his homework every evening?
The sun ______ (rise) in the east.
Tom and Jack ______ (be) good friends.
She usually ______ (go) to school by bike.
My father ______ (watch) TV after dinner.
Lucy ______ (have) a nice bag.
Water ______ (not boil) at 50°C.
If it ______ (rain) tomorrow, we will stay home.

items.title: 一般过去时 (The Simple Past Tense)
items.instruction: 用括号内动词的适当形式填空。

blocks.text: 一般过去时表示过去某个时间发生的动作或存在的状态，也表示过去经常或反复发生的动作。
表示过去某时发生的动作：I saw him yesterday.
表示过去的状态：He was a teacher ten years ago.
表示过去反复的动作：We often played football after school.
1. be 动词：was / were

rows: I / he / she / it / 单数

blocks.text: 2. 实义动词过去式（所有人称相同）
I / He / They worked hard yesterday.

sections.heading: 四、动词过去式变化规则

rows: 变 y 为 i 加 -ed

blocks.text: 常见不规则动词（必记）
am/is→was, are→were, go→went, do→did, have→had, see→saw
come→came, get→got, make→made, take→took, buy→bought, think→thought
be 动词句子
否定：He wasn't at home.  疑问：Were you there? —Yes, I was.
实义动词句子（借助 did，动词还原为原形）
否定：I didn't go to school yesterday.
疑问：Did you see him? —Yes, I did. / No, I didn't.
特殊疑问：What did you do last night?
yesterday, last night/week/year, ... ago, just now, in 2010, this morning, at that time 等。

exercises.q: I ______ (go) to the park yesterday.
She ______ (be) ill last week.
They ______ (not come) to school yesterday.
______ you ______ (see) the film last night?
He ______ (study) English very hard last term.
We ______ (stop) the car and got off.
My parents ______ (be) teachers ten years ago.
What ______ you ______ (do) last weekend?
Tom ______ (buy) a new bike last month.
She ______ (not be) at home this morning.

items.title: 一般将来时 (The Simple Future Tense)
items.instruction: 用括号内动词的适当形式填空。

blocks.text: 一般将来时表示将来某个时间要发生的动作或存在的状态，也表示将来经常发生的动作。
1. will + 动词原形（各人称通用）
I will go to Beijing next week.  否定：won't (will not)  疑问：Will you go...?
2. be going to + 动词原形
They are going to have a picnic tomorrow.
3. be about to + 动词原形（即将，表马上要做）
The train is about to leave.

sections.heading: 三、will 与 be going to 的区别

rows: It's going to rain.（乌云密布）

blocks.text: 现在进行时表将来（表按计划的位移动作）：I am leaving tomorrow.
一般现在时表将来（时间表）：The film starts at seven.
时间/条件状语从句用一般现在时表将来：主句 will，从句用一般现在时。
tomorrow, next week/month/year, in the future, soon, in +时间段（in three days）, from now on 等。
There be 的将来时：There will be / There is going to be a meeting.

exercises.q: I ______ (visit) my grandma next Sunday.
exercises.answer: will visit / am going to visit

exercises.q: Look at the clouds! It ______ (rain).
exercises.tip: 有迹象用 be going to

exercises.q: They ______ (not have) a meeting tomorrow.
______ you ______ (come) to my party?
There ______ (be) a football match next week.
If it ______ (be) fine tomorrow, we will go out.
exercises.tip: 条件从句用一般现在时

exercises.q: She ______ (leave) for Shanghai tomorrow morning.
We ______ (start) our trip in three days.
What ______ you ______ (do) this weekend?
The train ______ (arrive) at 9 o'clock tonight.

items.title: 过去将来时 (The Past Future Tense)
items.instruction: 用括号内动词的适当形式（过去将来时）填空。

blocks.text: 过去将来时表示从过去某一时间来看将要发生的动作或存在的状态，即“过去的将来”。它最常出现在宾语从句中——当主句是过去时，从句表将来时就要用过去将来时。
He said he would come tomorrow.（他说他明天会来。）
1. would + 动词原形（各人称通用，最常用）
I knew that he would help me.（我知道他会帮我。）
2. was / were going to + 动词原形（打算、计划）
They were going to have a party.（他们打算办个聚会。）
3. was / were about to + 动词原形（即将、马上要）
The train was about to leave when I arrived.（我到时火车正要开。）

rows: He was going to buy a car.

blocks.text: 宾语从句中：主句为过去时，从句表将来用过去将来时（时态呼应）。
He told me that he would be back soon.
表示过去的打算或预定：I was going to visit you, but it rained.
与一般将来时对照：将来时从“现在”看，过去将来时从“过去”看。
否定：He said he wouldn't come. / I wasn't going to tell you.
疑问：Did he say he would come? —Yes, he did.
would 是 will 的过去式；把直接引语变间接引语时，will 要相应变成 would。

exercises.q: He said he ______ (come) the next day.
exercises.tip: 宾语从句表过去的将来

exercises.q: I knew that she ______ (help) me.
They ______ (be going to) have a party, but it rained.
The teacher told us that we ______ (have) an exam.
She said she ______ (not come) to the party.
I ______ (be going to) call you, but I lost your number.
He asked if I ______ (go) with him.
The train ______ (be about to) leave when we arrived.
We were told that the meeting ______ (start) at nine.
Tom said he ______ (finish) it soon.

items.title: 现在进行时 (The Present Continuous Tense)
items.instruction: 用括号内动词的适当形式填空。

blocks.text: 现在进行时表示现在正在进行或发生的动作，也可表示现阶段一直在做的事，或用现在进行时表将来（计划安排）。

sections.heading: 二、结构：am / is / are + 动词-ing

blocks.text: 否定：He is not (isn't) working.  疑问：Are you working? —Yes, I am.

rows: 以不发音 e 结尾
变 ie 为 y 加 -ing

blocks.text: 表示此刻正在进行：Look! They are dancing.
表示现阶段持续（未必此刻）：I am reading a novel these days.
表示计划好的将来（去、来、离开等位移动词）：We are leaving tomorrow.
感官、情感、拥有类动词一般不用进行时：like, love, want, know, have(拥有), see, hear。
now, right now, at the moment, Look!, Listen!, these days 等。

exercises.q: Look! The children ______ (play) games.
Listen! Someone ______ (sing) in the room.
He ______ (write) a letter now.
They ______ (run) on the playground.
What ______ you ______ (do) now?
I ______ (not watch) TV at the moment.
The dog ______ (lie) on the floor.
We ______ (leave) for London tomorrow.
______ she ______ (read) a book now?
Look! It ______ (rain) outside.

items.title: 过去进行时 (The Past Continuous Tense)
items.instruction: 用括号内动词的适当形式填空。

blocks.text: 过去进行时表示过去某一时刻或某一段时间正在进行的动作。
I/he/she/it/单数 + was + doing；you/we/they/复数 + were + doing。
肯定：They were playing football at five yesterday.
否定：He wasn't sleeping.  疑问：Were you watching TV? —Yes, I was.
表示过去某一具体时刻正在做：At 8 o'clock last night, I was doing my homework.
常与 when / while 连用：一个动作进行时，另一个动作发生。
When the phone rang, I was cooking.（电话响时我正在做饭。）
While I was reading, my brother was playing.（两个动作同时进行，常用 while）
when 后多接一般过去时（短暂动作），while 后多接过去进行时（持续动作）。
at this time yesterday, at 8 o'clock last night, this time last week, when, while 等。

exercises.q: At nine last night, I ______ (read) a book.
They ______ (play) football at this time yesterday.
When I ______ (come) in, she was cooking.
While he ______ (watch) TV, the light went out.
What ______ you ______ (do) at that time?
He ______ (not sleep) when I called him.
The students ______ (have) a class at 10 a.m. yesterday.
______ she ______ (write) a letter then?
While my mother was cooking, I ______ (do) my homework.
It ______ (rain) hard when we left home.

items.title: 现在完成时 (The Present Perfect Tense)
items.instruction: 用括号内动词的适当形式填空。

blocks.text: 现在完成时表示过去发生的动作对现在造成的影响或结果，或从过去持续到现在的动作或状态。它强调与现在的联系。

sections.heading: 二、结构：have / has + 过去分词

blocks.text: 主语为第三人称单数用 has，其余用 have。
肯定：I have finished my homework.  She has gone to Beijing.
否定：I haven't finished it.  疑问：Have you finished? —Yes, I have.
规则动词过去分词与过去式相同（加 -ed）；不规则动词需单独记忆。
go→gone, do→done, see→seen, write→written, eat→eaten, take→taken, be→been
1. 表示动作已完成，强调对现在的影响
I have lost my key.（现在还没找到）
常用标志词：already（肯定）, yet（否定/疑问）, just, ever, never。
2. 表示从过去持续到现在的动作或状态
He has lived here for ten years. / since 2010.
常用标志词：for + 时间段, since + 时间点, so far, in the past few years。
have gone to（去了某地，人不在）vs have been to（去过某地，人已回来）。
非延续性动词（come, go, buy, borrow, die）不能直接与 for/since 连用，需转换为延续性表达。
误 He has died for 3 years. → 正 He has been dead for 3 years.

exercises.q: I ______ (finish) my homework already.
She ______ (not come) back yet.
______ you ever ______ (be) to Beijing?
He ______ (live) here since 2010.
They ______ (know) each other for ten years.
My father ______ (go) to Shanghai; he is not here.
I ______ (just, see) that film.
We ______ (not finish) the work yet.
How long ______ you ______ (learn) English?
The old man ______ (be) dead for five years.

items.title: 过去完成时 (The Past Perfect Tense)  【拓展】
items.instruction: 用括号内动词的适当形式填空。

blocks.text: 过去完成时是初中拓展、高中重点内容，了解即可，有助于理解“过去的过去”。
过去完成时表示过去某一时刻或动作之前已经完成的动作，即“过去的过去”。

sections.heading: 二、结构：had + 过去分词（各人称通用）

blocks.text: 肯定：By the time she arrived, the film had begun.
否定：I had not (hadn't) finished it before he came.
疑问：Had you left when he called?
两个过去动作，先发生的用过去完成时，后发生的用一般过去时。
When I got to the station, the train had already left.
常与 by, before, after, by the time, already, never...before 连用。
He told me he had seen the film before.（宾语从句中主句过去，从句更早用过去完成）

exercises.q: When we arrived, the meeting ______ (begin).
By the time he came, I ______ (finish) my work.
exercises.tip: by the time + 过去完成

exercises.q: She said she ______ (see) the film before.
The train ______ (leave) before I got there.
I ______ (not finish) breakfast when he arrived.
After he ______ (do) his homework, he went out.
They found that the thief ______ (run) away.
By last year, he ______ (learn) English for five years.

items.title: 被动语态 (The Passive Voice)
items.instruction: 用括号内动词的适当形式（被动语态）填空。

blocks.text: 语态表示主语与谓语动词之间的关系。主语是动作的执行者时用主动语态；主语是动作的承受者时用被动语态。
主动：We clean the room every day.  被动：The room is cleaned every day.

sections.heading: 二、基本结构：be + 过去分词

blocks.text: 被动语态由“助动词 be + 及物动词的过去分词”构成，be 的时态和主谓一致随句子而变。

rows: The work will be done tomorrow.
情态动词 + be + 过去分词
The book has been sold out.

blocks.text: 1. 把主动句的宾语变为被动句的主语。
2. 把谓语动词变为“be + 过去分词”，be 的时态与主动句一致，并与新主语保持数的一致。
3. 主动句的主语变为 by 短语放句末（不重要时可省略）。
主动：Tom wrote the letter. → 被动：The letter was written by Tom.
否定：The room isn't cleaned every day.
疑问：Is the room cleaned every day? —Yes, it is.
特殊疑问：When was the bridge built?
只有及物动词才有被动语态；不及物动词（happen, appear, rise 等）没有被动语态。
含情态动词时：情态动词 + be + 过去分词。The homework must be handed in on time.

exercises.q: English ______ (speak) in many countries.
The window ______ (break) by Tom yesterday.
The work ______ (finish) tomorrow.
This book ______ (write) by a famous writer.
Rice ______ (grow) in the south of China.
The classroom ______ (clean) every day.
The homework must ______ (hand) in on time.
exercises.tip: 情态动词 + be + 过去分词

exercises.q: A new hospital ______ (build) in our city last year.
These trees ______ (plant) by the students last week.
When ______ the bridge ______ (build)?

items.title: 情态动词 (Modal Verbs)
items.instruction: 用适当的情态动词或括号内动词的正确形式填空。

blocks.text: 情态动词表示说话人的语气和态度，如能力、可能、允许、义务等。它本身有词义，但不能单独作谓语，须与动词原形连用。
情态动词后接动词原形。
没有人称和数的变化（第三人称单数也不加 -s）。
否定直接在其后加 not，疑问把情态动词提到句首。

sections.heading: 二、常见情态动词及用法

rows: I can swim. Could you help me?
May I come in? It may rain.
You must finish it. He must be tired.

blocks.text: 1. must 与 have to
must 强调主观必要（我认为必须）；have to 强调客观需要（不得不）。
must 的否定 mustn't 表示“禁止”；have to 的否定 don't have to 表示“不必”。
2. can 与 may 表推测
肯定推测用 must（一定）；否定推测用 can't（不可能）；may/might 表示“可能”。
He must be at home.（一定在）He can't be at home.（不可能在）
3. can 与 be able to
can 只有现在和过去（could）两种时态；be able to 可用于各种时态。
情态动词后一律接动词原形：He can swims.（×）→ He can swim.（√）
回答 Must I...? 时，否定用 needn't / don't have to（不必），而非 mustn't（禁止）。

exercises.q: ______ you speak English? (能力)
You ______ finish your homework first. (必须)
It's late. I ______ (have to) go home now.
You ______ (should) listen to your teacher.
May I use your pen? — Yes, you ______.
He ______ (can) swim when he was five.
The light is on. Someone ______ be in the room. (一定)
—Must I go now? —No, you ______. (不必)
Look at the clouds. It ______ rain soon. (可能)
You ______ swim here. It's dangerous. (禁止)

items.title: 动词不定式 (The Infinitive)
items.instruction: 用括号内动词的适当形式（不定式或原形）填空。

blocks.text: 动词不定式由“to + 动词原形”构成，它不是谓语，没有人称和数的变化，在句中可作主语、宾语、宾语补足语、定语、状语等。
在某些动词或结构后，to 要省略（称为不带 to 的不定式）。
作主语：To learn English well is not easy.（常用 It 作形式主语：It is not easy to learn English well.）
作宾语：I want to go home.
作宾语补足语：I want you to help me.
作定语：I have a lot of work to do.
作目的状语：He came here to see you.

sections.heading: 三、只能接不定式作宾语的动词

blocks.text: want, hope, wish, decide, plan, agree, would like, learn, promise 等。
I hope to see you again. She decided to leave.

sections.heading: 四、省略 to 的不定式

blocks.text: 情态动词后：can/must/should + 动词原形。
使役动词 make/let/have + 宾语 + 动词原形：He made me laugh.
感官动词 see/hear/watch/feel + 宾语 + 动词原形（表全过程）：I saw him come in.
使役、感官动词变被动语态后，to 要还原：He was made to laugh.
too...to（太……而不能）：He is too young to go to school.
enough to（足够……去做）：She is old enough to dress herself.
疑问词 + to do：I don't know what to do / how to swim.
ask/tell/want sb. to do sth.：The teacher told us to be quiet.

exercises.q: I want ______ (go) home now.
It's important ______ (learn) English well.
The teacher told us ______ (be) quiet.
He is too tired ______ (walk) on.
She made me ______ (laugh).
I saw him ______ (come) into the room.
I have a lot of homework ______ (do) tonight.
He came here ______ (see) his friend.
Do you know how ______ (swim)?
He was made ______ (clean) the room.

items.title: 动名词 (The Gerund)
items.instruction: 用括号内动词的适当形式（动名词或不定式）填空。

blocks.text: 动名词由“动词 + -ing”构成，兼有动词和名词的特征，在句中可作主语、宾语、表语等。其变化规则与现在分词相同。
作主语：Swimming is good for health.
作宾语：I enjoy reading.
作表语：His job is teaching English.
作介词宾语：He is good at swimming.

sections.heading: 三、只能接动名词作宾语的动词

blocks.text: enjoy, finish, mind, keep, practise, suggest, give up, can't help, feel like 等。
记忆口诀：“建议 (suggest) 完成 (finish) 盼望 (?)……”常记：enjoy/finish/mind/keep/practise + doing。
Would you mind opening the window? I have finished doing my homework.
be good at doing（擅长）
be interested in doing（对……感兴趣）
look forward to doing（盼望）
thank you for doing（因……感谢你）
be afraid of doing（害怕）
这里的 to 是介词，后面必须接动名词，不是动词原形：look forward to seeing you。

sections.heading: 五、不定式与动名词意义不同的动词

blocks.text: Remember to close the door.（记得去关）／ I remember closing the door.（记得关过）
He stopped to smoke.（停下来去抽烟）／ He stopped smoking.（戒烟）

exercises.q: ______ (swim) is good for our health.
I enjoy ______ (listen) to music.
Would you mind ______ (open) the door?
He is good at ______ (play) football.
They finished ______ (do) their homework.
Please remember ______ (close) the window before leaving.
He stopped ______ (talk) when the teacher came in.
We are looking forward to ______ (see) you.
Thank you for ______ (help) me.
Don't forget ______ (bring) your book tomorrow.

items.file: 现在分词与过去分词(拓展)
items.title: 现在分词与过去分词 (Participles)  【拓展】
items.instruction: 用括号内动词的适当形式（现在分词或过去分词）填空。

blocks.text: 分词作定语、状语和补足语是初中拓展、高中重点，此处作了解，帮助建立体系。
现在分词表主动/正在进行：the running water（流动的水）, a sleeping baby。
过去分词表被动/已完成：a broken window（打破的窗户）, fallen leaves（落叶）。
单个分词作定语放在名词前；分词短语作定语放在名词后：the boy standing there。

sections.heading: 三、分词作表语（-ed/-ing 形容词）

blocks.text: The story is interesting.（令人感兴趣的）／ I am interested in it.（感到感兴趣的）
感官动词 + 宾语 + 现在分词（表正在进行）：I saw him playing football.
have/get + 宾语 + 过去分词（表被动完成）：I had my hair cut.（我理了发）

exercises.q: Look at the ______ (sleep) baby.
The ______ (break) window needs repairing.
Who is the boy ______ (stand) over there?
The film is very ______ (bore).
I am ______ (interest) in science.
I saw him ______ (cross) the street.
exercises.tip: 感官动词 + 现在分词

exercises.q: The ______ (fall) leaves covered the ground.
He had his bike ______ (repair) yesterday.

items.file: 句子成分与五种基本句型
items.title: 句子成分与五种基本句型
items.instruction: 判断并用括号内词的适当形式填空，体会句型结构。

rows: 动作的执行者/描述对象
说明主语的动作或状态

blocks.text: 句型1：主语 + 谓语（不及物动词）S + V
The sun rises. / Birds fly.
句型2：主语 + 系动词 + 表语 S + V + P
She is a teacher. / The soup tastes good.
句型3：主语 + 谓语 + 宾语 S + V + O
I like English. / He plays football.
句型4：主语 + 谓语 + 间接宾语 + 直接宾语 S + V + IO + DO
He gave me a book. = He gave a book to me.
句型5：主语 + 谓语 + 宾语 + 宾语补足语 S + V + O + OC
We call him Tom. / Keep the room clean.
常见系动词：be(am/is/are)、look, feel, taste, sound, smell, become, get, turn, keep 等，后接形容词作表语。
It's getting cold. / He became a doctor.

exercises.q: The flowers ______ (smell) sweet.
He ______ (give) me a nice present.
We call the boy ______ (Tom).
Please keep the classroom ______ (clean).
The sun ______ (rise) in the east.
She ______ (be) a good teacher.
They ______ (make) him ______ (monitor).
The music ______ (sound) beautiful.
He passed ______ (I) the salt.
The weather ______ (get) warmer.

items.file: 简单句并列句与复合句
items.title: 简单句、并列句与复合句
items.instruction: 用适当的连词填空，或判断句子种类。

rows: 两个及以上简单句由并列连词连接
I like English, and he likes math.
一个主句 + 一个及以上从句
I think that he is right.

blocks.text: and（和）, but（但是）, or（或者/否则）, so（所以）, for（因为）
关联连词：both...and, either...or, neither...nor, not only...but also
Hurry up, or you'll be late. He was tired, but he kept working.
复合句由主句和从句构成，从句根据在句中的作用分为：名词性从句（主语/宾语/表语从句）、定语从句和状语从句。
宾语从句：I know that you are right.
定语从句：The man who is talking is my teacher.
状语从句：I will call you when he comes.

exercises.q: He is poor ______ he is happy. (但是)
Study hard, ______ you will fail. (否则)
It was raining, ______ we stayed at home. (所以)
______ Tom ______ Jack are here. (两者都)
I believe ______ he will come. (宾语从句连词)
The girl ______ is singing is my sister. (定语从句)
I'll wait ______ you come back. (时间状语)
Neither he ______ I am wrong. (既不……也不)
She likes English, ______ I like math. (和)
He stayed home ______ he was ill. (因为)

items.title: There be 句型
items.instruction: 用 there be 的适当形式填空。

blocks.text: There be 句型表示“某处存在某人/某物”，意为“有”。be 动词的单复数由其后第一个名词决定（就近原则）。
There is a book on the desk. There are some books on the desk.
be 动词的单复数与紧跟其后的名词保持一致，与后面的名词无关。
There is a pen and two books.（就近 a pen，用 is）
There are two books and a pen.（就近 two books，用 are）

rows: There will be / is going to be

blocks.text: 否定：There isn't any water. / There are no books.
疑问：Is there a bank near here? —Yes, there is. / No, there isn't.
How many + 复数名词 + are there...? How much + 不可数名词 + is there...?
There be 句型 vs have：There be 表客观存在；have 表主观拥有。

exercises.q: There ______ a book on the desk.
There ______ some students in the classroom.
There ______ a pen and two books on the table.
There ______ two books and a pen on the table.
There ______ a park here ten years ago.
______ there any water in the bottle?
There ______ a meeting tomorrow.
How many students ______ there in your class?
There ______ (not) any milk in the fridge.
______ there a hospital near here? —Yes, there ______.

items.title: 祈使句 (Imperative Sentences)
items.instruction: 按要求完成祈使句填空。

blocks.text: 祈使句用来表示请求、命令、建议、劝告等，主语（you）通常省略，句子以动词原形开头。
动词原形开头：Open the door. / Be quiet, please.
Let 引导：Let's go.（我们走吧）Let me try.（让我试试）
加上 please 语气更客气，可放句首或句末（放句末前加逗号）。
Don't + 动词原形：Don't be late. / Don't worry.
Let's 的否定：Let's not go. / Don't let's go.
Never do that again!（加强否定）

sections.heading: 四、祈使句 + and / or + 句子

blocks.text: “祈使句 + and + 结果”表示“如果……就……”；“祈使句 + or + 结果”表示“否则……”。
Work hard, and you will succeed.（努力就会成功）
Hurry up, or you'll miss the bus.（快点，否则会误车）

sections.heading: 五、祈使句的反意疑问句

blocks.text: 肯定祈使句 + will you?：Open the window, will you?
Let's 开头 + shall we?：Let's go, shall we?
Let us（不含听话人）+ will you?：Let us have a rest, will you?

exercises.q: ______ (open) the door, please.
______ (not be) late for school.
______ (let) us go swimming.
Work hard, ______ you will pass. (就)
Hurry up, ______ you'll be late. (否则)
Be quiet, ______ ______? (反意疑问)
Let's go home, ______ ______? (反意疑问)
______ (not worry). Everything will be fine.
Please ______ (be) careful when crossing the road.
______ (never) tell a lie again.

items.title: 感叹句 (Exclamatory Sentences)
items.instruction: 用 What 或 How 完成感叹句填空。

blocks.text: 感叹句用来表达强烈的感情，如惊讶、喜悦、赞叹等，通常由 what 或 how 引导，句末用感叹号。
What 修饰名词，结构为：What + (a/an) + 形容词 + 名词 + 主语 + 谓语!
可数名词单数：What a nice day (it is)!
可数名词复数：What beautiful flowers (they are)!
不可数名词：What delicious food (it is)!
How 修饰形容词、副词或动词，结构为：How + 形容词/副词 + 主语 + 谓语!
How + 形容词：How beautiful the flowers are!
How + 副词：How fast he runs!
How + 主语 + 谓语：How time flies!

sections.heading: 四、What 与 How 的转换

blocks.text: What a clever boy he is! = How clever the boy is!
What good news it is! = How good the news is!
判断技巧：若强调名词用 What，若强调形容词/副词用 How。

exercises.q: ______ a beautiful garden it is!
exercises.tip: What + a + 形容词 + 名词

exercises.q: ______ beautiful the garden is!
______ interesting books they are!
______ fast the boy runs!
______ delicious the food is!
exercises.tip: 不可数 + 形容词用 How

exercises.q: ______ good news it is!
______ clever a girl she is!
exercises.tip: What + a + 形容词 + 名词

exercises.q: ______ well she sings!
______ cold it is today!
______ a wonderful film we saw!
exercises.tip: What + a + 形容词 + 名词

items.title: 疑问句 (Interrogative Sentences)
items.instruction: 根据要求完成疑问句填空（一般/特殊/选择疑问句）。

blocks.text: 疑问句用来提出问题，句末用问号。按结构和用途分为四类：

rows: 用疑问词提问，需具体回答
提供两项及以上供选择
Do you like tea or coffee?

blocks.text: 反意疑问句另有专篇讲解，本篇重点讲前三类。
把陈述句中的 be动词、情态动词或助动词提到句首，句末读升调，用 Yes/No 回答。
含 be 动词：She is a nurse. → Is she a nurse?
含情态动词：He can swim. → Can he swim?
含实义动词：借助 do/does/did，动词还原。
They like music. → Do they like music?
He works hard. → Does he work hard?（does 出现，work 还原）
Tom went home. → Did Tom go home?（did 出现，go 还原）
肯定与否定回答
Are you a student? —Yes, I am. / No, I'm not.
Do you like it? —Yes, I do. / No, I don't.
用疑问词开头，对具体内容提问，句末读降调，不能用 Yes/No 回答。结构：疑问词 + 一般疑问句语序?

rows: How do you go to school?

blocks.text: how 引导的常用短语
how many + 可数名词复数（多少）：How many books do you have?
how much + 不可数名词 / 问价格（多少钱）：How much water is there? / How much is it?
how long（多长/多久）：How long is the river?
how often（多久一次，问频率）：How often do you exercise?
how far（多远，问距离）：How far is it from here?
how old（多大，问年龄）：How old are you?
对主语提问时用“疑问词 + 谓语?”，不用助动词。如 Who broke it?（不是 Who did break it?）
用 or 连接两个及以上选项，句中 or 前读升调、后读降调，不能用 Yes/No 回答，须选其一回答。
Do you like apples or bananas? —I like apples.
Is he a teacher or a doctor? —He is a teacher.
Which do you prefer, tea or coffee? —Coffee, please.
回答须具体说明选择，不能只回答 Yes 或 No。

exercises.q: ______ you like English?（一般疑问，实义动词）
______ she a doctor?（一般疑问，be 动词）
______ he go to school?（一般疑问，第三人称）
______ is your father?（问人是谁）
______ book is this?（问“谁的”）
______ do you live?（问地点）
______ do you get up every day?（问时间）
______ ______ apples do you want?（问数量，可数）
______ ______ is the milk?（问价格）
______ ______ do you play sports?（问频率）
______ ______ is it from your home to school?（问距离）
Do you go by bus ______ by bike?（选择疑问）

items.title: 反意疑问句 (Question Tags)
items.instruction: 写出下列句子的反意疑问部分填空。

blocks.text: 反意疑问句是在陈述句后附加一个简短的疑问，用来表示反问、征求意见或核实。基本原则：前肯后否，前否后肯。
He is a teacher, isn't he?（前肯后否）
She isn't here, is she?（前否后肯）
附加疑问部分的助动词/be动词/情态动词要与前面陈述句一致。
主语用人称代词（he/she/it/they 等）。
陈述句是实义动词时，附加部分借助 do/does/did。
You like English, don't you? He went there, didn't he?
He never comes late, does he?（含 never，后用肯定）
There is a book, isn't there?
回答依事实而定：符合事实用 Yes + 肯定，不符合用 No + 否定，与前面陈述句的肯定否定无关。
You aren't a student, are you? —Yes, I am.（事实是学生就用 Yes）

exercises.q: He is a doctor, ______?
She isn't at home, ______?
You like music, ______?
Tom went to school, ______?
Open the window, ______?
Let's go home, ______?
There is a pen, ______?
He never tells a lie, ______?
I am right, ______?
They can swim, ______?

items.title: 宾语从句 (Object Clauses)
items.instruction: 用适当的连接词或正确语序完成宾语从句填空。

blocks.text: 在复合句中作宾语的从句叫宾语从句，通常放在及物动词或介词之后。宾语从句要注意连接词、语序和时态三方面。

rows: I don't know if he will come.

sections.heading: 三、语序：一律用陈述句语序

blocks.text: 无论原来是什么句子，宾语从句都要用“主语 + 谓语”的陈述句语序，不能倒装。
误 Do you know where does he live? → 正 Do you know where he lives?
误 I don't know what is this. → 正 I don't know what this is.
主句是现在时，从句时态根据需要而定。
主句是过去时，从句要用相应的过去时态（一般过去、过去进行、过去完成、过去将来）。
从句表示客观真理时，即使主句是过去时，仍用一般现在时。
He said that he was busy. / The teacher told us that the earth is round.

exercises.q: I know ______ he is a good student. (陈述)
Do you know ______ he will come? (是否)
Tell me where ______ (he live).
I don't know what ______ (this be).
He asked me ______ I could help him. (是否)
She said that she ______ (be) busy then.
The teacher told us the earth ______ (be) round.
Do you know when the train ______ (leave)?
I wonder if it ______ (rain) tomorrow.
He asked me where I ______ (live).

items.title: 定语从句 (Attributive Clauses)
items.instruction: 用适当的关系词（who/which/that/whose/where/when）填空。

blocks.text: 在复合句中修饰某一名词或代词的从句叫定语从句。被修饰的词叫先行词，引导定语从句的词叫关系代词或关系副词，放在先行词之后。
The man who/that is talking is my teacher.（先行词 the man，指人）
This is the book which/that I bought yesterday.（先行词 the book，指物）
when（时间）：I'll never forget the day when we met.
where（地点）：This is the house where he lives.
why（原因）：Tell me the reason why you were late.

sections.heading: 四、只用 that 的情况

blocks.text: 先行词是 all, everything, something, nothing, anything 等不定代词。
先行词被序数词、最高级修饰。
先行词被 the only, the very, the same 修饰。
先行词既有人又有物。
This is the best film that I have ever seen.
关系代词在从句中作宾语时可省略：The book (that/which) I bought is good.

exercises.q: The man ______ is talking is my teacher.
This is the book ______ I bought yesterday.
The girl ______ bag is red is Lucy.
This is the house ______ he lives.
I'll never forget the day ______ we first met.
This is the best film ______ I have ever seen.
All ______ glitters is not gold.
exercises.tip: 先行词 all 用 that

exercises.q: The teacher ______ we love is very kind.
The dog ______ is running is mine.
Tell me the reason ______ you were late.

items.title: 状语从句 (Adverbial Clauses)
items.instruction: 用适当的连词或动词形式完成状语从句填空。

blocks.text: 状语从句在复合句中作状语，修饰主句的谓语动词或整个主句，根据意义可分为时间、原因、条件、让步、结果、目的等。
连词：when, while, as, before, after, until/till, as soon as, since。
I will call you as soon as I arrive.
主将从现：主句用将来时，时间状语从句用一般现在时表将来。
连词：if（如果）, unless（除非，=if...not）。
If it rains tomorrow, we will stay at home.
You will fail unless you work hard.（=if you don't work hard）
条件状语从句同样遵循“主将从现”。

sections.heading: 四、原因、让步、结果状语从句

blocks.text: 原因：because, since, as。He didn't come because he was ill.
让步：although/though（尽管），although 与 but 不能连用。
Although he is old, he still works hard.
结果：so...that（如此……以至于）, such...that。
He is so tired that he can't walk. It was such a nice day that we went out.

rows: such + (a/an) + 形容词 + 名词 + that

exercises.q: I will call you when he ______ (come) back.
If it ______ (rain) tomorrow, we won't go out.
______ he was ill, he still went to school. (尽管)
He didn't come ______ he was ill. (因为)
You will be late ______ you hurry. (除非)
He is ______ tired ______ he can't move. (如此……以至于)
It was ______ a nice day ______ we went out. (如此……)
I'll wait ______ you come back. (直到)
As soon as he ______ (arrive), he called me.
______ you study hard, you will succeed. (如果)

items.file: 主语从句与表语从句(拓展)
items.title: 主语从句与表语从句  【拓展】
items.instruction: 用适当的连接词完成填空。

blocks.text: 主语从句、表语从句属名词性从句，初中偶有涉及、高中重点，此处作了解，帮助建立完整体系。
在复合句中作主语的从句叫主语从句，常由 that, whether, 疑问词引导。
That he passed the exam made us happy.（that 引导主语从句）
常用 it 作形式主语
It is important that we (should) protect the environment.
It is said that he has left.（据说他已离开）
在复合句中作表语的从句叫表语从句，位于系动词 be 之后，常由 that, whether, 疑问词, because 引导。
The problem is that we have no money.
The question is whether we can finish it on time.
That's because he was late.（那是因为他迟到了）
表语从句一律用陈述句语序，同宾语从句。

exercises.q: ______ he will come is not certain. (是否)
It is important ______ we should study hard. (that)
The problem is ______ we have no time. (that)
The question is ______ he can do it. (是否)
It is said ______ he is rich. (that)
That's ______ he was ill. (因为)
______ she said made us angry. (所……的话)
It is clear ______ he made a mistake. (that)

items.title: 倒装句 (Inversion)  【拓展】
items.instruction: 完成下列倒装句填空。

blocks.text: 倒装是初中拓展、高中重点，了解常见形式即可。
把谓语（或部分谓语）放到主语之前，叫倒装。分为完全倒装和部分倒装。
1. There be 结构（完全倒装）
There is a book on the desk.
2. Here / There 开头（完全倒装，主语为名词）
Here comes the bus! / There goes the bell!
但主语是代词时不倒装：Here it is! / Here you are!
3. so / neither / nor 开头表示“也……”（部分倒装）
肯定：—I like English. —So do I.（我也是）
否定：—I can't swim. —Neither/Nor can I.（我也不会）

sections.heading: 三、So + 主语 + 助动词（表示“的确如此”）

blocks.text: —He works hard. —So he does.（他的确努力，不倒装，表赞同）
区分：So do I（我也……，倒装）vs So he does（他的确……，不倒装）。

exercises.q: —I like music. —So ______ I. (我也是)
—She can't swim. —Neither ______ I. (我也不会)
Here ______ the bus! (来了)
—Tom is a student. —So ______ Jack. (也是)
There ______ a pen on the desk.
—He didn't go. —Nor ______ I. (我也没)
There ______ the bell! (响了)
—They will come. —So ______ we. (也会)

items.title: 直接引语与间接引语 (Direct & Indirect Speech)
items.instruction: 把直接引语改为间接引语，完成填空。

blocks.text: 直接引用别人的原话叫直接引语，用引号标出；用自己的话转述别人的话叫间接引语，不用引号，常构成宾语从句。
直接：He said, “I am busy.”  间接：He said that he was busy.
用 that 引导宾语从句（that 可省略），人称、时态、时间地点状语相应变化。
He said, “I like English.” → He said that he liked English.
一般疑问句：用 if/whether 引导，变陈述语序。
He asked, “Do you like it?” → He asked if I liked it.
特殊疑问句：用原疑问词引导，变陈述语序。
She asked, “Where do you live?” → She asked where I lived.

sections.heading: 四、人称、时态、状语的变化

rows: then / that day / the next day

blocks.text: 若主句谓语是现在时，或从句是客观真理，时态不变。

exercises.q: He said, “I am tired.” → He said that he ______ tired.
She said, “I will come.” → She said she ______ come.
Tom said, “I like English.” → Tom said he ______ English.
He asked, “Do you know it?” → He asked ______ I knew it.
She asked, “Where do you live?” → She asked where I ______.
He said, “I am reading.” → He said he ______ reading.
They said, “We have finished.” → They said they ______ finished.
The teacher said, “The earth is round.” → The teacher said the earth ______ round.
He said, “I saw him yesterday.” → He said he ______ seen him the day before.
She asked, “Can you help me?” → She asked if I ______ help her.

items.title: 主谓一致 (Subject-Verb Agreement)
items.instruction: 用括号内动词的适当形式填空，注意主谓一致。

blocks.text: 主谓一致指谓语动词在人称和数上要与主语保持一致。判断的关键是看主语是“单数”还是“复数”。
He likes music.（单数主语用 likes）
They like music.（复数主语用 like）
谓语的单复数由主语的语法形式决定。
主语是单数或不可数名词，谓语用单数：The news is good.
主语是复数，谓语用复数：The students are here.
and 连接的两个主语，谓语一般用复数：Tom and Jerry are friends.
and 连接的若指同一人/物或同一概念，谓语用单数：The writer and teacher is coming.（一人身兼两职）
由 or, either...or, neither...nor, not only...but also, there be 等连接的并列主语，谓语与最近的主语保持一致。

rows: Either you or he is right.
Neither he nor they are wrong.
Not only I but also she likes it.
A pen or two books are on the desk.
There is a book and two pens.

blocks.text: 集体名词看含义：family, class, team 等表整体用单数，表成员用复数。
My family is big.（整体） / My family are watching TV.（成员）
“the + 形容词”表一类人，用复数：The old are respected.
表示时间、金钱、距离的复数名词表整体概念，用单数：Ten years is a long time.

rows: A number of students are here.
主语 + with/along with/as well as
Tom, as well as I, is right.

exercises.q: The news ______ (be) exciting.
Tom and Jerry ______ (be) good friends.
Either you or he ______ (be) right.
Neither he nor they ______ (be) wrong.
Not only I but also she ______ (like) it.
exercises.tip: not only...but also 就近，看 she

exercises.q: Every student ______ (have) a book.
There ______ (be) a pen and two books on the desk.
The number of students ______ (be) 40.
A number of students ______ (be) playing.
Ten years ______ (be) a long time.
My family ______ (be) watching TV now.
Everyone ______ (be) here today.

items.title: 系动词与表语 (Linking Verbs & Predicative)
items.instruction: 用括号内词的适当形式填空（注意系动词后接形容词）。

blocks.text: 系动词本身有一定词义，但不能单独作谓语，必须与表语一起构成“系动词 + 表语”结构，说明主语的身份、性质或状态。其中最重要、最常用的系动词就是 be 动词 (am / is / are / was / were)。
She is a teacher.（说明身份）  The soup tastes good.（说明状态）

sections.heading: 二、be 动词的基本用法

blocks.text: 1. be + 名词（说明身份、职业）
He is a doctor. / They are students.
2. be + 形容词（说明性质、特征）
The flowers are beautiful. / I am happy.
3. be + 介词短语（说明位置、状态）
The book is on the desk. / He is at home.
4. be + 表示年龄、价格、时间等
She is twelve (years old). / The price is high. / It is seven o'clock.
be 动词的人称变化

rows: It is getting dark. Leaves turn yellow.

blocks.text: 感官系动词 (look/feel/sound/taste/smell) 后接形容词，不接副词。误 It sounds well. → 正 It sounds good.

sections.heading: 四、系动词 vs 实义动词（易错）

blocks.text: 同一个词有时是系动词（后接形容词），有时是实义动词（后接宾语或副词）。要根据句意判断。
系动词：The apple tastes good.（苹果尝起来不错，接形容词）
实义动词：She tastes the soup carefully.（她仔细尝汤，接宾语/副词）
判断技巧：系动词可用 be 替换而句意基本不变；实义动词不能。

exercises.q: The soup tastes ______ (good).
You look ______ (tire) today.
exercises.tip: look 系动词 + 形容词

exercises.q: It ______ (be) seven o'clock now.
The flowers ______ (be) beautiful.
The music sounds ______ (beautiful).
It is getting ______ (cold) in winter.
exercises.tip: get 表变化 + 形容词

exercises.q: Please keep ______ (quiet) in the library.
Leaves ______ (turn) yellow in autumn.
The cake smells ______ (sweet).
They ______ (be) students two years ago.

items.title: 虚拟语气 (The Subjunctive Mood)  【拓展】
items.instruction: 用括号内动词的适当形式（虚拟语气）填空。

blocks.text: 虚拟语气是初中拓展、高中重点。初中主要考查两种基础形式：wish 引导的从句 和 与现在事实相反的 if 条件句。
虚拟语气表示说话人的假设、愿望、建议等，所说的并非事实，或与事实相反、难以实现。谓语动词要用特殊的形式。

sections.heading: 二、wish 引导的宾语从句（表示愿望）

blocks.text: wish 后的宾语从句表示一种难以实现或与事实相反的愿望，从句谓语要“时态后退”。

rows: 用一般过去时（be 用 were）
I wish I were a bird.
用 would / could + 动词原形
I wish it would stop raining.
I wish I had studied harder.

blocks.text: I wish I knew the answer.（但愿我知道答案——其实不知道）
虚拟语气中，所有人称的 be 一律用 were：I wish I were you.

sections.heading: 三、与现在事实相反的 if 条件句

blocks.text: 结构：If + 主语 + 一般过去时（be 用 were），主句 + would/could/might + 动词原形。
If I were you, I would accept it.（如果我是你，我会接受——但我不是你）
If I had time, I would help you.（如果我有时间就帮你——其实没时间）
对比真实条件句：If it rains tomorrow, I will stay home.（可能发生，用一般现在时，不是虚拟）

sections.heading: 四、与过去事实相反的 if 条件句（了解）

blocks.text: 结构：If + 主语 + had + 过去分词，主句 + would/could have + 过去分词。
If I had known, I would have told you.（要是我早知道就告诉你了）
would rather + 从句（宁愿）：I would rather you came tomorrow.
It's time + 从句（该……了）：It's time we went home.
if only（要是……就好了）：If only I were younger!

exercises.q: I wish I ______ (be) a bird.
exercises.tip: 虚拟中 be 用 were

exercises.q: If I ______ (be) you, I would study harder.
exercises.tip: 与现在相反 be 用 were

exercises.q: I wish I ______ (know) the answer now.
If he ______ (have) money, he would buy a car.
I wish it ______ (stop) raining soon.
If I ______ (have) time, I would help you.
I wish I ______ (study) harder last year.
exercises.tip: 与过去相反用 had done

exercises.q: If I were you, I ______ (accept) the job.
It's time we ______ (go) home.
If only I ______ (be) younger!
